zh.Ponyton, Prestbury, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Warrene於1373年出生在英國爾波易頓時，他的父親Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport30歲，母親Margaret Stafford28歲。他於1390年與Agnes Wynnington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年2月14日在英國素可沃倫享年40歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可布托。

zh-hans.Ponyton, Prestbury, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Warrene于1373年出生在英国爾波易頓时，他的父亲Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport30岁，母亲Margaret Stafford28岁。他于1390年与Agnes Wynnington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年2月14日在英国素可沃倫享年40岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可布托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warrene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Warren
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Warrene was born in 1373, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Stafford, was 28. He married Agnes Wynnington in 1390. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 14 February 1413, in Warren, Sussex, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Booton, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Warrene est né en 1373, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Wynnington en 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1413, à Warren, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Booton, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Warrene 1373 in Poynton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Stafford 28. Er hat 1390 Agnes Wynnington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1413 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Warren, Sussex, England und wurde in Booton, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Warrene è nato il nel 1373 nel Poynton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stafford, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Wynnington nel 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1413, nel Warren, Sussex, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Booton, Norfolk, England.

ja.Warren, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスワーレン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Warreneが1373年にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで生まれた時，父Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockportは30歳，母Margaret Staffordは28歳であった。1390年にAgnes Wynningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年2月14日にイギリススセックスワーレンで40歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクボオトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Warrene(이)가 1373년 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stafford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1390년 Agnes Wynnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 2월 14일 영국 수세스 워르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 부턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Warrene nasceu em 1373, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stafford, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wynnington em 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1413, em Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Booton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Warrene родился в 1373 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wynnington в 1390 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1413 г. в местности варрен, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности бутон, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Warrene nació en 1373, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Stafford, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes Wynnington en 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1413, en Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Booton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
